title: South Africa Corporate Income Tax Return (ITR14) — Body Corporate/Share Block Company pathway
description: File a South African company income tax return (ITR14) via SARS eFiling for a company classified as a 'Body Corporate' (established under the Sectional Titles Act, 1986) or a 'Share Block Company' (defined in the Share Blocks Control Act, 1980). The ITR14 is a dynamically customised return: the 'Information to create this income tax return' wizard first asks the filer to classify the company (dormant, share block company, body corporate, micro business, small business, or medium to large business), and SARS generates only the Annexure that classification requires. This document models Annexure B (guide Section 12, pp.24-46): the Form Wizard questions (§12.1) and the Company/Close Corporation Particulars, Tax Practitioner Details, Declaration, Balance Sheet, Income Statement, and core (non-SARS-calculated) Tax Computation adjustment sections of the return itself (§12.2). Like za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-micro-business, a Body Corporate/Share Block return requires a full Balance Sheet, Income Statement, and Tax Computation (the guide states these containers are shared verbatim across the Dormant, Body Corporate/Share Block, and Micro Business pathways) — but unlike Micro Business, this document's Tax Computation Adjustments Allowable includes two additional fields (levyExemptionS10_1_e_i, otherIncomeExemptionS10_1_e_ii under section 10(1)(e)) that the guide states are 'disabled/greyed out' for a Micro Business classification but apply directly here. It deliberately does not model the repeating Share/Membership Register, Details of Beneficial Owner(s), Schedule of Local/Foreign Capital Gains and Losses, PAYE Credits Available (per-IRP5), Donations-to-organisation detail list, Foreign Tax Credits (s6quat(1A)) computation container, or Details of Enhanced Renewable Energy Deduction (s12BA) containers — spec v0.3 has no repeating/nested field model (SPEC.md Section 12), the same limitation recorded in za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-dormant's and za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-micro-business's VERIFICATION.md files. It also does not model the Special Economic Zone container's full mandatory sub-questionnaire (only the top-level qualifying-company gate) — see VERIFICATION.md for the full scope rationale. Unlike Micro Business, guide Section 12 does not document a Non-Residency, Personal Service Provider, Crypto Assets Transactions, Partnership/Joint Ventures, or 'listed on a recognised stock exchange' section for the Body Corporate/Share Block pathway, so those fields are not modelled here — see VERIFICATION.md. It does not submit the return, compute tax payable, or determine any refund/assessment amount — the live SARS eFiling platform is always authoritative, and all SARS-calculated subtotal/control-total fields (e.g. Total Assets, Gross Profit/Loss, Net Profit/Loss, and each section's Control Total) are deliberately excluded as fields, following this registry's established discipline (SPEC.md §16).

source.documentRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 (How to complete the Income Tax Return (ITR14) for Companies — External Guide), Revision 19, effective 2 March 2026

verification.notes: GOV-1282 'GovSchema Standard Research' cycle: CATALOG.md's 'Known Gaps & Opportunities' section (as updated by GOV-1275) explicitly named ZA SARS ITR14's Annexure B (Body Corporate/Share Block, guide pp.24-46) as the natural next candidate after Micro Business, being next-smallest and sharing most of its Balance Sheet/Income Statement/Tax Computation structure. Authored from the same SARS 'How to complete the Income Tax Return (ITR14) for Companies' External Guide used for za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-dormant and za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-micro-business (IT-GEN-04-G01, Revision 19, effective 2 March 2026, fetched directly from sars.gov.za, HTTP 200, genuine text layer extracted in full with pdfjs-dist's getTextContent, no OCR needed) — this time reading Section 12 ('ANNEXURE B — BODY CORPORATE/SHARE BLOCK COMPANY', §§12.1-12.2, pp.24-46) in full. Key structural findings versus the Micro Business sibling document: (1) the gross-income/total-assets size-threshold fields (guide §12.1.3(h)) are explicitly documented as displaying only when NEITHER 'body corporate' NOR 'share block company' is answered 'Yes' — i.e. they belong to the Micro/Small/Medium pathway, not Annexure B, so they are correctly absent from this document, unlike a naive copy of the Micro Business field set would produce; (2) guide Section 12 does not document a Non-Residency (§13.2.5 in Micro Business), Personal Service Provider (§13.2.6), Crypto Assets Transactions (§13.2.7), or Partnership/Joint Ventures (§13.2.25) completion section, nor a 'listed on a recognised stock exchange' question, for the Body Corporate/Share Block pathway — these fields are correctly omitted here rather than assumed-present; (3) isResidentInSouthAfrica and howManyBeneficialOwners are real, guide-quoted wizard questions (confirmed via their use as completion-stage gating conditions at §12.2.6(a) and §12.2.7(b)) but are not given their own named wizard sub-header the way Micro Business's §13.1.10 'Company Information' container names them — flagged in each field's own description, not silently dropped; (4) two new fields specific to Body Corporate classification: confirmRegisteredWithDeedsOffice and deedsOfficeRegistrationNumber (§12.1.3(f)(iii), introduced from the 2025 year of assessment onwards); (5) two Tax Computation Adjustments Allowable fields that Micro Business's VERIFICATION.md explicitly excluded as 'disabled/greyed out for Micro Business' — levyExemptionS10_1_e_i and otherIncomeExemptionS10_1_e_ii (guide §12.2.10(f)(i)(E)-(F)) — are included here since the guide states they apply specifically to Body Corporate/Share Block companies. Scope cuts, all per the 'no repeating/nested field model' limitation (SPEC.md Section 12), mirroring the discipline already established in the two sibling ITR14 documents: (a) the Share/Membership Register (§12.2.6, up to 4 sub-containers, each itself repeating up to 20 rows) and Details of Beneficial Owner(s) (§12.2.7, repeats 0-9 times) — only the top-level gating/count fields (doesCompanyHaveMembers, howManyBeneficialOwners, howManyClassesOfShares) are modelled; (b) the Schedule of Local/Foreign Capital Gains and Losses (§12.2.16, an unbounded repeating table) — only the top-level gating booleans and the two single-field debt-reduction amounts (§12.2.17-12.2.18, not repeating) are modelled; (c) PAYE Credits Available (§12.2.20, repeats per IRP5 certificate) — only the top-level gate and count are modelled; (d) Donations Allowable to approved organisations (§12.2.12-12.2.13, repeats up to 20 organisations) — only the top-level gate, count, and total-amount fields are modelled; (e) Foreign Tax Credits: Taxable Foreign Sourced Income of Resident Companies — s6quat(1A) (§12.2.19) — deferred in full as a nested computation container comparable in scope to the Tax Computation section; (f) Details of Enhanced Renewable Energy Deduction — s12BA (§12.2.11) — deferred in full, gated on a >R0 value in enhancedRenewableEnergyDeductionS12ba, retained as a plain currency field; (g) the Special Economic Zone container's full mandatory sub-questionnaire (§12.2.5) — only the top-level qualifying-company gate (isQualifyingSezCompany) is modelled. All SARS-calculated fields (Total Assets; Total Equity and Liabilities; Gross Profit/Loss subtotal; both Income Statement Control Totals; Net Profit/Loss subtotal; both Tax Computation Control Totals; Calculated Profit/Loss before CFC income) are excluded, consistent with this registry's established discipline of not modelling derived/computed values (SPEC.md §16) — imputedNetIncomeFromCfc is the sole exception, since the guide describes it as filer-entered (Source Code 4276). isTaxPractitionerFiling carries forward the same inferred-gating caveat as both sibling ITR14 documents. A mock conformance/za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-body-corporate/1.0.0/application-packet.json test run was independently checked with a from-scratch GSP-0013 condition evaluator — see VERIFICATION.md for the field/violation counts. Status remains 'draft' pending a live eFiling walkthrough, the same constraint recorded in all three ITR14 company-type documents published so far.

fields.name: companyClassification
fields.label: Company classification
fields.description: The company's classification, determined by the ITR14's 'Information to create this income tax return' wizard. This determines which Annexure (A-E) the return generates. This document models Annexure B (Body Corporate/Share Block Company): a body corporate established under the Sectional Titles Act, 1986, or a share block company defined in the Share Blocks Control Act, 1980.
fields.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §12(a)-(b), §12.1.3(i) — 'Return Type... pre-populated... with one of the following return types: Dormant / Body Corporate/Share Block Company / Micro business / Small Company / Medium to Large Company'

fields.name: detailsVerifiedAndConfirmed
fields.label: Have the banking, public officer and contact details of the company been verified and confirmed as correct?
fields.description: If 'No', the ITR14 return cannot be requested; the legal entity information must first be updated via 'Maintain SARS Registered Details' on eFiling.

fields.name: publicOfficerCompliant
fields.label: Does the company confirm that the person appointed as public officer complies with the requirements of section 246 of the Tax Administration Act, 2011 (not removed for misconduct, not convicted of a relevant offence, tax compliant, and not disqualified from serving as director/office bearer/trustee)?
fields.description: Displayed once detailsVerifiedAndConfirmed is 'Yes'. Applicable from the 2024 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isCompanyDormant
fields.label: Is the company dormant?
fields.description: A Body Corporate/Share Block return implies the company is not dormant.

fields.name: ceasedTradingDuringPeriod
fields.label: Did the company cease trading during this tax period?
fields.description: Displayed for all years of assessment once the company is not dormant.

fields.name: isCooperative
fields.label: Is the company a co-operative as defined in section 1 of the Income Tax Act?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2025 year of assessment onwards. Only one of the co-operative/association-of-persons/non-profit-company/collective-investment-scheme/body-corporate/share-block company-type questions may be answered 'Yes'.

fields.name: isAssociationOfPersons
fields.label: Is the company an association of persons as contemplated in paragraph (d) of the definition of 'company' in section 1?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2025 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isNonProfitCompany
fields.label: Is the company a non-profit company as defined in section 1 of the Companies Act?
fields.description: Called 'Is the company a non-profit company?' for the 2024 year of assessment and prior.

fields.name: isCollectiveInvestmentScheme
fields.label: Is the company a Collective Investment Scheme registered as a company?
fields.description: Re-asked verbatim within the Donations (S18A) wizard section to gate which Donations-allowable container the return displays (see wantsS18aDonationsDeduction).

fields.name: isBodyCorporateSectionalTitles
fields.label: Is the company a body corporate established in terms of the Sectional Titles Act, 1986?
fields.description: 'Yes' cannot be selected for both this question and isShareBlockCompany. This document models the pathway where at least one of the two is 'Yes'.

fields.name: confirmRegisteredWithDeedsOffice
fields.label: Does the company confirm that the company is registered with the deeds office?
fields.description: Displayed from the 2025 year of assessment onwards. If 'No' is selected, an error message is displayed indicating that a body corporate must be registered with the Deeds Office — the return cannot proceed with 'No' here.

fields.name: deedsOfficeRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Deeds Office Registration Number

fields.name: isShareBlockCompany
fields.label: Is the company a share block company as defined in the Share Blocks Control Act?
fields.description: 'Yes' cannot be selected for both this question and isBodyCorporateSectionalTitles. Called 'Is the company a share block company defined in the Share Blocks Control Act as referred to in s10(1)(e)?' for the 2024 year of assessment and prior.

fields.name: howManyClassesOfShares
fields.label: How many different classes of shares have been issued by the company?
fields.description: Value 1-99. The Share/Membership Register's Classes of Shares sub-section then displays, limited to the 3 highest Rand-value classes regardless of the number entered — out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: doesCompanyHaveMembers
fields.label: Does the company have members?
fields.description: Only displayed if the company is an association of persons, a co-operative, a body corporate, or a non-profit company. If 'Yes', the Share/Membership Register container displays (out of scope for this document — see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: howManyBeneficialOwners
fields.label: How many beneficial owners does the company have?
fields.description: Zero (0) is allowed where no natural person ultimately owns or exercises effective control over the company. If greater than zero, the Details of Beneficial Owner(s) container displays, repeated per owner — out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md). Applicable from the 2024 year of assessment onwards. Unlike za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-micro-business, guide Section 12 (Annexure B) does not give this question its own '§12.1.x Company Information' wizard sub-header — it is inferred as a wizard-stage question from its use as a completion-stage gating condition at §12.2.7(b).

fields.name: hadLocalCapitalGainOrLoss
fields.label: Did the company have any transactions or events which resulted in a locally sourced capital gain or loss (including crypto assets)?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Schedule of Local Capital Gains and Losses in respect of the disposal of assets displays — a repeating table out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: hadForeignCapitalGainOrLoss
fields.label: Did the company have any transactions or events which resulted in a foreign sourced capital gain/loss (including crypto assets)?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Schedule of Foreign Capital Gains and Losses in respect of the disposal of assets displays — a repeating table out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: hadDebtReducedForNoConsideration
fields.label: Has any debt been reduced for no consideration which has the effect of reducing the company's assessed capital loss under paragraph 12A(4) of the Eighth Schedule?

fields.name: reductionForLocalAsset
fields.label: Was the reduction for a local asset?

fields.name: reductionForForeignAsset
fields.label: Was the reduction for a foreign asset?

fields.name: localDebtReductionAmount
fields.label: Amount of debt reduction — local assessed capital loss (R)
fields.description: Source code 4254. Programmatically reduces the Local Assessed Capital Loss Carry Over, limited to the amount available.

fields.name: foreignDebtReductionAmount
fields.label: Amount of debt reduction — foreign assessed capital loss (R)
fields.description: Source code 4255.

fields.name: relatesToVoluntaryDisclosureProgramme
fields.label: Does any declaration in this return relate to an application made under the SARS Voluntary Disclosure Programme?

fields.name: vdpApplicationNumber
fields.label: VDP application number issued by SARS
fields.description: Alphanumeric; the first three characters must be 'VDP'. No spaces or dashes. Must be for an approved VDP agreement between SARS and the company.

fields.name: isQualifyingSezCompany
fields.label: Is the company a qualifying company as defined in section 12R (Special Economic Zones)?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Special Economic Zones (SEZ) section displays for completion, including which SEZ(s) the company is located in and a series of mandatory qualification-confirmation questions — out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md). Introduced from the 2017 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: wantsS7fDeduction
fields.label: Does the company want to claim a deduction i.t.o. section 7F in respect of SARS interest repaid that was previously taxed i.t.o. section 7E?

fields.name: s7fDeductionAmount
fields.label: Amount of SARS interest repaid that was previously taxed i.t.o. section 7E (R)
fields.description: Source code 4052.

fields.name: wantsS18aDonationsDeduction
fields.label: Does the company want to claim donations made to an approved organisation in terms of section 18A?

fields.name: howManyOrganisationsDonatedTo
fields.label: How many organisations did the company donate to?
fields.description: The per-organisation name/PBO-number/amount detail (up to the top 20 by monetary value) is out of scope for this document — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: totalAmountDonated
fields.label: Total amount donated during the year of assessment (R)
fields.description: Source code 4011. Subject to a 10% of taxable income limit under section 18A.

fields.name: averageValueOfParticipatoryInterests
fields.label: Average value of the aggregate of all participatory interests held by investors in the portfolio (R)

fields.name: wantsPayeCredits
fields.label: Will the company be claiming any PAYE credits reflected on an IRP5 tax certificate?
fields.description: For ITR14 returns from the 2019 form year onwards, PAYE credits cannot be manually captured — only pre-populated IRP5 information is accepted; additional IRP5 certificates require submission at a SARS branch.

fields.name: numberOfIrp5Certificates
fields.label: Number of IRP5 tax certificates
fields.description: SARS pre-populates this count. The per-certificate PAYE Credits Available container (non-taxable income, gross employment income, certificate number, PAYE credit) is out of scope for this document — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: wantsForeignTaxCreditsS6quat1a
fields.label: Will the company be claiming any Foreign Tax credits not relating to Capital Gain transactions in terms of section 6quat(1A) and/or a treaty?
fields.description: If 'Yes', the Foreign Tax Credits: Taxable Foreign Sourced Income of Resident Companies — section 6quat(1A) computation container displays — out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: hadForeignTaxCreditsRefunded
fields.label: Were any foreign tax credits refunded/discharged during the year of assessment for which a rebate was allowed during a previous year of assessment in terms of section 6quin?

fields.name: foreignTaxRefundedAllowedAsRebate
fields.label: Portion of the amount refunded/discharged that was previously allowed by SARS as a rebate (R)

fields.name: foreignTaxRefundedAllowedAsS6quat1cDeduction
fields.label: Portion of the amount refunded/discharged that was previously allowed by SARS as a deduction in terms of section 6quat(1C) (R)
fields.description: Source code 4249.

fields.name: wantsS6quat1cDeduction
fields.label: Will the company be claiming a deduction on SA sourced trading income i.t.o. section 6quat(1C)?
fields.description: Applicable from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: s6quat1cDeductionAmount
fields.label: Deduction i.t.o. section 6quat(1C) for foreign taxes paid or proved to be payable to a foreign government on any SA sourced trade income (R)
fields.description: Source code 4053.

fields.name: hadRightOfRecoveryOtherThanMap
fields.label: Did the company have a right of recovery (other than a right of recovery i.t.o. a mutual agreement procedure, or any entitlement to carry back losses arising during any previous year of assessment)?

fields.name: foreignTaxRefundedDuringYear
fields.label: Was the foreign tax amount refunded to the company during this year of assessment?

fields.name: taxableIncomeFromSaSourcedTradeTaxedOutsideSa
fields.label: Taxable income from SA sourced trade income taxed outside SA, before considering section 18A/6quat(1C) deductions (R)
fields.description: This income must have been declared elsewhere in the return; the related deduction/carry-over is calculated by SARS. Applicable from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: isResidentInSouthAfrica
fields.label: Is the company resident in South Africa for income tax purposes?
fields.description: Unlike za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-micro-business, guide Section 12 (Annexure B) does not give this question its own '§12.1.x Company Information' wizard sub-header, nor does it document a Non-Residency completion section (§13.2.5's equivalent is absent from Annexure B) — it is inferred as a wizard-stage question from its use as a completion-stage gating condition at §12.2.6(a).

fields.name: isRegisteredForCustoms
fields.label: Is the company registered/licensed for customs purposes?

fields.name: numberOfCustomsClientCodes
fields.label: Number of customs client codes allocated to this company

fields.name: taxReferenceNumber
fields.label: Tax reference number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The company's SARS income tax reference number. Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: yearOfAssessment
fields.label: Year of assessment
fields.description: Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: registeredName
fields.label: Registered name
fields.description: Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: tradingName
fields.label: Trading name
fields.description: Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: companyRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Company/CC registration number
fields.description: Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: financialYearEnd
fields.label: Financial year-end
fields.description: Format CCYYMMDD. Pre-populated (read-only) in the Company/Close Corporation Particulars container.

fields.name: isReturnForForeignBranchOrAgency
fields.label: Is this return in respect of a branch/permanent establishment/agency of a foreign company?

fields.name: provinceOfMajorityIncome
fields.label: Where the majority of the company's taxable income/loss is derived from
fields.description: The nine South African provinces plus 'International', using sequential A-J lettering.

fields.name: standardIndustryCode
fields.label: Standard Industry Code (SIC) applicable to the main activity of the company
fields.description: Selected from the Standard Industry Codes booklet published at www.statssa.gov.za.

fields.name: profitCodeMainSource
fields.label: Profit code of the main source of income
fields.description: Selected from SARS' main source code list. Note (§12.2.1(b)(iv)): a Body Corporate company must select source code 3018 (2003 onwards, else 3008); a Share Block company must select 3019 (2003 onwards, else 3009) — both are directly applicable to this document's scope.

fields.name: profitCodeOtherDescription
fields.label: Description, if the profit code of the main source of income is 'other not specified'
fields.description: Mandatory free-text field (maximum 56 characters) only if the selected profit code ends with '98'. Not expressible as a requiredWhen condition on profitCodeMainSource's own value under GSP-0013 (no string-suffix operator) — left optional here; a filer/agent must supply it whenever that condition holds.

fields.name: isTaxPractitionerFiling
fields.label: Return completed by a registered tax practitioner
fields.description: Inferred gating field: guide §12.2.2 is headed 'TAX PRACTITIONER DETAILS (If applicable)' but the Annexure B wizard text does not show an explicit Yes/No question for it — applicability is most likely determined by the logged-in eFiling user's practitioner-registered role rather than an in-form question, the same caveat recorded for za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-dormant and za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-micro-business.

fields.name: taxPractitionerRegistrationNumber
fields.label: Tax practitioner registration number
fields.description: Alphanumeric, 9 characters; the first two characters must be 'PR'.

fields.name: taxPractitionerTelNumber
fields.label: Tax practitioner telephone number
fields.description: Numeric field, up to 15 characters.

fields.name: taxPractitionerNoEmailDeclared
fields.label: Mark here with an 'X' if you declare that you do not have an email address
fields.description: If marked, the Tax Practitioner Email address field is locked and greyed out.

fields.name: taxPractitionerEmailAddress
fields.label: Tax practitioner email address
fields.description: Free text, up to 52 characters.

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Declaration date
fields.description: Format CCYYMMDD. The Company Representative/Public Officer's eFiling login serves as authentication for submission; if submitted at a SARS branch, the signature pad is signed instead.

fields.name: nonCurrentAssetsPropertyPlantEquipment
fields.label: Non-current assets — Property, plant and equipment (R)
fields.description: All fields in this section are compulsory; complete zero (0) if not applicable. Use figures from the company's own (not group/consolidated) annual financial statements, in Rands with no cents.

fields.name: nonCurrentAssetsVehicles
fields.label: Non-current assets — Vehicles (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2017 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: nonCurrentAssetsLongTermLoans
fields.label: Non-current assets — Long-term loans (R)

fields.name: currentAssetsInventoryWorkInProgress
fields.label: Current assets — Inventory and work in progress, net after provisions (R)

fields.name: currentAssetsTradeAndOtherReceivables
fields.label: Current assets — Trade and other receivables, net after provisions (R)

fields.name: currentAssetsCashAndCashEquivalents
fields.label: Current assets — Cash and cash equivalents (R)

fields.name: otherAssets
fields.label: Other assets (R)

fields.name: totalEquityCapitalAndReserves
fields.label: Total equity (capital and reserves) (R)
fields.description: A debit balance (assessed loss) is entered as a negative value (e.g. -10000); a credit balance is entered as a positive value.

fields.name: nonCurrentLiabilitiesLongTermLoansAndProvisions
fields.label: Non-current liabilities — Long-term loans and provisions (R)

fields.name: currentLiabilitiesTradeAndOtherPayables
fields.label: Current liabilities — Trade and other payables, including accruals (R)

fields.name: otherEquityAndLiabilities
fields.label: Other equity and liabilities (R)

fields.name: salesTurnover
fields.label: Sales (turnover) (R)
fields.description: All fields in this section are compulsory; complete zero (0) if not applicable. Use the normal accounting meaning of the terms used; if the company has no cost of sales (e.g. a property rental company), turnover and gross profit will be the same amount.

fields.name: lessCostOfSales
fields.label: Less: Cost of sales (R)

fields.name: interestExcludingSarsInterest
fields.label: Income items — Interest, excluding SARS interest (s7E) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: sarsInterestS7e
fields.label: Income items — SARS Interest (s7E) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2019 year of assessment onwards. SARS pre-populates based on any IT3(b) certificate(s); can be amended upward but not reduced.

fields.name: reitDistributionsReceived
fields.label: Income items — REIT distributions received (R)

fields.name: accountingProfitOnDisposalOfAssetsIncome
fields.label: Income items — Accounting profit on disposal of fixed assets and/or other assets (R)

fields.name: badAndDoubtfulDebtsRecovered
fields.label: Income items — Bad and doubtful debts recovered (R)

fields.name: dividendsDeemedIncomeS8eS8ea
fields.label: Income items — Dividends (local and foreign) deemed to be income (s8E and s8EA) (R)

fields.name: taintedDividendsDeemedIncomeS22b
fields.label: Income items — Tainted dividends (local and foreign) deemed to be income (s22B) (R)

fields.name: levyIncome
fields.label: Income items — Levy income (R)
fields.description: Mandatory to complete for a Body Corporate/Share Block Company (§12.1.3(f)(iv)(B)(I), (g)(iii)(II)).

fields.name: governmentGrantsIncome
fields.label: Income items — Government grants (national, provincial and local) (R)

fields.name: foreignExchangeGainIncome
fields.label: Income items — Foreign exchange gain (R)

fields.name: otherIncomeItems
fields.label: Income items — Other income (R)

fields.name: accountingLossOnDisposalOfAssetsExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Accounting loss on disposal of fixed assets/other assets (R)

fields.name: badDebtsWrittenOff
fields.label: Expense items — Bad debts written off (R)

fields.name: depreciationExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Depreciation (R)

fields.name: donationsS18aExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Donations (s18A) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2015 year of assessment onwards. When completed, pre-populates and locks the matching 'Donations (s18A)' add-back field in Tax Computation.

fields.name: donationsOtherExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Donations, other (R)
fields.description: Mandatory from the 2015 year of assessment onwards; complete zero if no donations were made. When completed, pre-populates and locks the matching 'Donations — Other' add-back field in Tax Computation.

fields.name: foreignExchangeLossExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Foreign exchange loss (R)

fields.name: interestPaidExpense
fields.label: Expense items — Interest paid (R)
fields.description: Applicable from the 2024 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: municipalCharges
fields.label: Expense items — Municipal charges (electricity, water, sewerage, refuse, rates and taxes) (R)

fields.name: provisionForDoubtfulDebts
fields.label: Expense items — Provision for doubtful debts (R)

fields.name: salariesAndWages
fields.label: Expense items — Salaries and wages, including directors'/members' remuneration (R)

fields.name: sarsInterestRepaidS7fExpense
fields.label: Expense items — SARS interest repaid (s7F) (R)

fields.name: repairsMaintenanceInsurance
fields.label: Expense items — Repairs, maintenance, insurance, alterations and improvements (R)

fields.name: travellingExpenses
fields.label: Expense items — Travelling expenses (R)

fields.name: otherExpenseItems
fields.label: Expense items — Other expenses, excluding expenses listed above (R)

fields.name: accountingInterestPaidPayableAddBack
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Accounting interest paid/payable (R)
fields.description: All fields in this section are compulsory; complete zero (0) if not applicable. Where accounting and tax treatment differ, the full accounting amount is reversed here and the full tax treatment amount disclosed under Adjustments Allowable.

fields.name: accountingLossOnDisposalAddBack
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Accounting loss on disposal of fixed and/or other assets (R)

fields.name: capitalExpenditureAndOrLossesAddBack
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Capital expenditure and/or losses (R)

fields.name: depreciationAddBack
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Depreciation according to financial statements (R)

fields.name: donationsS18aAddBack
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Donations (s18A) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2015 year of assessment onwards. Pre-populated from donationsS18aExpense and locked (see VERIFICATION.md); retained as a field per this registry's precedent for declared pre-filled values.

fields.name: donationsOtherAddBack
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Donations, other (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2015 year of assessment onwards. Pre-populated from donationsOtherExpense and locked (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: doubtfulDebtsAddBack
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Doubtful debts (R)

fields.name: expensesAttributableToExemptIncome
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Expenses attributable to exempt income and not actually incurred in production of income (R)

fields.name: interestClaimedExceedingInterestReceivedS11g
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Interest claimed exceeding interest received, not linked to trading (s11G) (R)
fields.description: Applicable from the 2024 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: nonDeductibleProvisions
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Non-deductible provisions (R)

fields.name: foreignExchangeLossAdjustmentS24l
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Foreign exchange loss adjustment (s24I, excluding s24I(4)) (R)

fields.name: foreignExchangeLossAdjustmentRelatingToDebtS24l
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Foreign exchange loss adjustment relating to debt (s24I(4)) (R)

fields.name: reversalOfPreviousYearAllowances
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Reversal of previous year allowances/deductions granted (R)

fields.name: sarsInterestRepaidS7fAddBack
fields.label: Adjustments added back — SARS interest repaid (s7F) (R)

fields.name: recoupmentS8_4_nAEnhancedRenewableEnergy
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Recoupment i.t.o. s8(4)(nA) for Enhanced Renewable Energy assets as contemplated in s12BA (R)
fields.description: Applicable from the 2024 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: taxableAmountsNotDeclaredInIncomeStatement
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Taxable amounts not declared in Income Statement, incl. recoupments (excl. s8(4)(nA) recoupment) (R)
fields.description: Displayed as 'Taxable amounts not declared in Income Statement (incl. recoupments)' for the 2023 year of assessment and prior.

fields.name: levyIncomeAddBack
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Levy income (R)

fields.name: otherAdjustmentsAddedBack
fields.label: Adjustments added back — Other (only items not listed above) (R)

fields.name: accountingProfitOnDisposalAllowable
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Accounting profit on disposal of fixed and/or other assets (R)
fields.description: All fields in this section are compulsory; complete zero (0) if not applicable.

fields.name: exemptLocalDividends
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Exempt local dividends (R)
fields.description: Applicable from the 2016 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: receiptsAccrualsOfCapitalNature
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Receipts and/or accruals of a capital nature (R)

fields.name: reversalOfProvisions
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Reversal of provisions (R)

fields.name: levyExemptionS10_1_e_i
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Levy exemption in terms of s10(1)(e)(i) (R)
fields.description: Applicable only to companies classified as Body Corporate or Share Block Company — for a Micro Business, this field is disabled/greyed out (see za/sars/corporate-income-tax-return-itr14-micro-business's VERIFICATION.md). Section 10(1)(e)(i) exempts any levy income received by or accrued to a Body Corporate/Share Block company from normal tax.

fields.name: otherIncomeExemptionS10_1_e_ii
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Other income exemption (excluding levy) in terms of s10(1)(e)(ii) (R)
fields.description: Introduced from 2009 onwards, applicable only to companies classified as Body Corporate or Share Block Company — for a Micro Business, this field is disabled/greyed out. Section 10(1)(e)(ii) exempts from normal tax any receipts and accruals other than levy income, to the extent the aggregate does not exceed R50,000.

fields.name: exemptionS10_1_yA
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Exemption i.t.o. s10(1)(yA) (R)

fields.name: wearAndTearS11e
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Wear and tear, s11(e) (R)

fields.name: doubtfulDebtAllowanceS11j
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Doubtful debt allowance, s11(j) (R)

fields.name: doubtfulDebtAllowanceIfrsAppliedS11j_i
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Doubtful debt allowance, IFRS applied, s11(j)(i) (R)

fields.name: doubtfulDebtAllowanceIfrsNotAppliedS11j_ii
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Doubtful debt allowance, IFRS not applied, s11(j)(ii) (R)

fields.name: depreciableAssetAllowanceS11o
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Depreciable asset allowance, s11(o) (R)

fields.name: enhancedRenewableEnergyDeductionS12ba
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Enhanced machinery, plant, implements, utensils and articles used in the production of renewable energy deduction, s12BA (R)
fields.description: Displayed from the 2024 year of assessment onwards. If greater than zero, the Details of Enhanced Renewable Energy Deduction — s12BA container (renewable energy type, generation capacity, total cost) displays — out of scope for this document (see VERIFICATION.md).

fields.name: plantAndMachinerySbcS12e
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Plant and machinery where company qualifies as a Small Business Corporation (SBC), s12E (R)
fields.description: Introduced from the 2002 year of assessment onwards; applicable from the 2019 year of assessment onwards.

fields.name: exemptGovernmentGrantsS12p
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Exempt income received or accrued in respect of government grants, s12P (R)

fields.name: foreignExchangeGainAdjustmentS24i
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Foreign exchange gain adjustment (s24I, excluding s24I(4)) (R)

fields.name: foreignExchangeGainAdjustmentRelatingToDebtS24i
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Foreign exchange gain adjustment relating to debt (s24I(4)) (R)

fields.name: otherAdjustmentsAllowable
fields.label: Adjustments allowable — Other (only items not listed above) (R)

fields.name: imputedNetIncomeFromCfc
fields.label: Imputed net income from Controlled Foreign Company (CFC) (R)
fields.description: Source code 4276. Unlike the Calculated Profit/Loss lines in this subsection (which SARS computes automatically), this line is filer-entered.

documents.label: Annual Financial Statements (Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Notes to the AFS)
documents.sourceRef: IT-GEN-04-G01 §9(c) — 'For Small Businesses and Medium to Large Businesses... submission of signed off supporting Annual Financial Statement (AFS) is compulsory. For all other companies, it is optional.'

documents.label: Declaration
documents.statement: The ITR14 return is a legal declaration to SARS and by signing you agree that the information is accurate. You are obliged to ensure that a full and accurate disclosure is made of all relevant information as required in the ITR14 return. Misrepresentation, omission or negligence in submitting a declaration or supplying false information may result in prosecution.
